provenance: Measured on real BrainScaleS-2 silicon via EBRAINS (hxtorch hardware-in-the-loop training; the analog-MAC forward pass runs on the chip so the intrinsic device noise is in the training loop). Continual Yin-Yang, 2 tasks (rot 0 -> rot 90deg, strong interference), shared 4-128-3 head, avg=1 (the chip's maximum intrinsic noise). Single seed, proof-of-concept. Wall time 4738 s (~79 min including quiggeldy queueing).

config.note: importance normalized+CLAMPED (the fix); barrier + Doob steering auto-calibrated to the noise-driven weight drift

note: Barrier-conditioning retains the prior task 15.6 pts better than the matched unconditioned control, with the chip's intrinsic noise in the loop. At this single un-tuned operating point the rule leans toward stability (doob trades task1 plasticity 0.47 vs 0.64); average accuracy is ~matched (doob 0.581 vs ou 0.590) while retention strongly favours doob. Single seed; joules not measured.
